title: Lebanon’s Aoun defends US-backed framework, says it preserves state authority and rights

snapshot.title: Lebanon’s Aoun defends US-backed framework, says it preserves state authority and rights
snapshot.description: DUBAI: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun on Wednesday defended a US-backed framework agreement with Israel, saying it reinforced state authority and protected Lebanon’s rights after years of conflict. Speaking during a meeting with delegations from the Beirut and North Lebanon Bar Associations and economic groups, Aoun said the framework that emerged from Washington negotiations
snapshot.author: Arab News
